map:
REFERENT
| the unit named in the report ⟩ —?— | the behavior observed at runtime ⟩
which one is my referent — and if they live in different code, which code am I about to edit?

GOAL
| the fix as stated ⟩ —?— | the intent behind the report ⟩
which am I serving — and what in the report makes the other one wrong?

SCOPE
| the call site in question ⟩ —?— | every site the pattern repeats ⟩
which extent did the task set — and who decided the other was in or out?

CRITERIA
| the check turning green ⟩ —?— | the failure not recurring ⟩
which done am I building toward — and does reaching one reach the other here?

REFERENT
| the named case ⟩ —?— | the class it stands for ⟩
which is my object — and which one will the findings actually be about?

GOAL
| the question as asked ⟩ —?— | the decision it feeds ⟩
which am I answering — and what tells me the other isn't the real assignment?

SCOPE
| the sources in hand ⟩ —?— | the field they sit in ⟩
which boundary am I working — and was the other excluded or just unmentioned?

CRITERIA
| a verdict delivered ⟩ —?— | the uncertainty mapped ⟩
which counts as answered here — and does the asker want the other folded in or left out?

REFERENT
| the topic named ⟩ —?— | the occasion prompting it ⟩
which is the piece about — and which one is the reader meant to meet?

GOAL
| the artifact specified ⟩ —?— | the effect sought ⟩
which am I shaping — and where do the two stop producing each other?

SCOPE
| the section requested ⟩ —?— | the whole it sits in ⟩
which extent owns my changes — and what happens at the seam with the other?

CRITERIA
| the brief satisfied ⟩ —?— | the reader moved ⟩
which finish line is mine — and who says crossing one crosses the other?

REFERENT
| the matter discussed ⟩ —?— | the standing it touches ⟩
which is this message handling — and what does it do to the other on the way?

GOAL
| the words I need sent ⟩ —?— | the reading they'll make ⟩
which am I optimizing — and what does ignoring the other one cost?

SCOPE
| this message ⟩ —?— | the thread it settles or stirs ⟩
which am I writing — and does closing one open the other?

CRITERIA
| sent and unambiguous ⟩ —?— | received and acted on ⟩
which counts as delivered — and what would show the other didn't happen?

REFERENT
| the document requested ⟩ —?— | the situation it serves ⟩
which am I producing — and which one is the requester going to use?

GOAL
| the plan asked for ⟩ —?— | the outcome behind it ⟩
which am I building toward — and what makes the other out of bounds?

SCOPE
| the horizon stated ⟩ —?— | the constraints binding past it ⟩
which window am I planning in — and what from the other reaches into it?

CRITERIA
| every step covered ⟩ —?— | first contact survived ⟩
which complete is required — and which one will the plan be judged by?

REFERENT
| the format requested ⟩ —?— | the semantics carried ⟩
which am I preserving — and what in the other gets silently rewritten to comply?

GOAL
| the conversion specified ⟩ —?— | the use awaiting it ⟩
which am I serving — and would the other accept this output as is?

SCOPE
| the records in this file ⟩ —?— | the feed they arrive on ⟩
which am I handling — and is the other someone else's problem or mine?

CRITERIA
| the contract met ⟩ —?— | the content kept ⟩
which is my pass condition — and where do the two diverge in this data?

REFERENT
| the artifact submitted ⟩ —?— | the work it represents ⟩
which am I reviewing — and which one do my findings attach to?

GOAL
| the review requested ⟩ —?— | the decision it gates ⟩
which am I performing — and what makes the other someone else's call?

SCOPE
| the lines changed ⟩ —?— | the system they touch ⟩
which surface am I judging — and who covers what the other exposes?

CRITERIA
| every issue noted ⟩ —?— | each issue actionable ⟩
which makes this review done — and which one will the author actually use?

REFERENT
| the current subtask ⟩ —?— | the assignment that spawned it ⟩
which is my object right now — and does finishing one still serve the other?

GOAL
| this step closed ⟩ —?— | the mission advanced ⟩
which am I serving this turn — and what evidence says the other is still on course?

SCOPE
| what this step owns ⟩ —?— | what earlier steps deferred ⟩
which load am I carrying — and where is the other accumulating?

CRITERIA
| motion made ⟩ —?— | distance closed ⟩
which is my progress measure — and would the other agree with it right now?

DIAGNOSIS
| the reported failure ⟩ —?— | the underlying fault ⟩
which am I fixing — and would fixing the other change what I'm about to touch?

METHOD
| the committed path ⟩ —?— | the live option set ⟩
which am I producing — and when does holding the other become its own mistake?

STATE
| the next action ⟩ —?— | the remaining distance ⟩
which am I steering by — and when did I last check one against the other?

PRIORITY
| the defects present ⟩ —?— | the verdict overall ⟩
which am I delivering — and does the other survive what I found?
